sections.heading:
Reach More Middle-Aged Patients
Who Trust Apple.
sections.subheading: Middle-aged adults use Apple devices for everything — including finding their next doctor. This landing page is designed to help GPs, specialists, and clinics attract and convert those patients before a competitor does.

sections.heading: Why Doctors Choose This Platform
sections.subheading: Simple tools that help you attract patients, save time, and grow your practice — no tech team needed.

items.title: Attract the Right Patients
items.description: Middle-aged adults (40-65) are the fastest-growing patient segment on Apple devices. Our platform puts your practice in front of them when they're actively looking for a doctor — not just browsing.

items.title: Save Hours Every Week
items.description: Automated appointment reminders, follow-ups, and intake forms — all handled for you. Your front desk focuses on patients, not paperwork. Most practices save 8-12 hours per week.

items.title: HIPAA-Safe, Always
items.description: Every piece of patient data is encrypted and handled with full HIPAA compliance built in. You get the marketing power without the compliance headache.

sections.heading: Trusted by Doctors Across the Country
sections.subheading: Real results from GPs, specialists, and clinics already using the platform.

items.quote: Within 60 days we had 34 new patient bookings — mostly 45-60 year olds. They all came from Apple Health and Google search. The setup took one afternoon.
items.author: Dr. Rachel Kim

items.quote: I was skeptical about digital marketing but this was straightforward. My receptionist set it up while I was in clinic. We have been booked solid since.
items.author: Dr. James Oduya

items.quote: Our no-show rate dropped by 40% after turning on the automated reminders. That alone paid for the subscription many times over.
items.author: Dr. Maria Santos

sections.heading: Start Seeing More Patients This Month
sections.description: $99/month. No contract. No setup fees. Takes under 30 minutes to go live. Cancel anytime.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.subheading: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: Do I need to be tech-savvy to use this?
items.answer: Not at all. If you can send an email, you can use this platform. Most doctors are fully set up within 30 minutes. We also offer onboarding support if you get stuck.

items.question: Why focus on middle-aged patients specifically?
items.answer: Adults aged 40-65 represent the highest-value patient segment — they have established insurance, visit doctors more regularly, and are very loyal once they find a practice they trust. They are also the heaviest users of Apple Health and iPhone health features.

items.question: Is this HIPAA compliant?
items.answer: Yes. Full HIPAA compliance is built into everything — patient data, communications, intake forms. You will receive a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) when you sign up. No additional compliance work required on your end.

items.question: How quickly will I see new patients?
items.answer: Most practices see their first new bookings within 2-4 weeks. Some see results in the first week. It depends on your location and specialty, but we will give you a realistic forecast before you commit.

items.question: What does the $99/month include?
items.answer: Everything: patient acquisition tools, automated appointment reminders, intake forms, follow-up messaging, HIPAA-compliant data handling, and customer support. No hidden fees, no add-on charges.
